description_long: This ornate fountain features a tall, classical pedestal topped with a sculpted female figure holding an urn above her head. The pedestal is richly decorated with reliefs, including lion head motifs and intricate geometric patterns. Two semi-circular basins extend from either side of the base, each with a raised rim and a central spout area. The fountain sits on a square plinth, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century European public fountains, blending both functional and decorative elements. The reddish-brown coloration suggests it is made from cast stone or bronze with a patinated finish.
description: A tall, classical fountain with a sculpted female figure atop a richly decorated pedestal, flanked by two semi-circular basins and adorned with lion head motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the female statue, ornate pedestal, lion head relief, and both semi-circular basins clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the statue, the depth of the pedestal, and one semi-circular basin extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the statue, pedestal details, and both basins visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the statue's profile, pedestal, and the other semi-circular basin.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with a sculpted female figure holding an urn, lion head reliefs on the pedestal, and geometric patterns. The style is classical with detailed motifs and artistic embellishments.
attribute_basin_structure: The fountain has two semi-circular basins extending from either side of the base, each with a raised rim and a central spout area. The basins are integrated into the pedestal structure.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the current state of the fountain.
